title: Add swappable QIF provider profile for AOF quality claims
description: Track QIF as an external versioned quality framework instead of vendoring it into AOF. Add a swappable profile that pins QIF v0.2.1 source metadata, defines adapter responsibilities, and makes future QIF upgrades explicit.
triage_notes: Added swappable QIF provider profile pinned to ai-org-labs/quality-intent-framework v0.2.1, schema validation, integration docs, and roadmap direction for QIF-governed benchmark explanation.
